Off Calendar Jun-29-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant's Motion for Order Extending the Jurisdiction of the Court appointed Arbitrator is ordered off calendar/failure to comply with CCP 1005 (b). Proceedings reported by: Jacqueline Chan CSR # 10276. (212)

Notice Of Defts' Motion To: 1) Compel Independent Medical Examination; And 2) Award Monetary Sanctions (Atty'S Fees And Costs)
Off Calendar Mar-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Leah Madden, David Madden and Cindy Madden's motion to compel an independent medical examination is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendants forthwith to schedule the examination at a mutually convenient time. The examination is to be completed by April 21, 2006. The Court finds that plaintiff failed to appear at the previously scheduled examination and has failed to respond to efforts to reschedule the appointment. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $760 are to be paid on or before April 21, 2006. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion For An Order; Compelling Pltf To Comply;Compelling Pltfs To Comply With The Court; Awarding Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-01-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Leah Madden, David Madden and Cindy Madden's motion for an order to compel compliance with the prior court order to respond to form interrogatories and request for production set #1 (Tasso Mavroudis) and to pay monetary sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff Tasso Mavroudis is ordered to fully comply with the prior order by providing complete verified responses without objection and by paying the monetary sanctions of $373.80 within 15 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that plaintiff disobeyed the prior order. Additional monetary sanctions in the amount of $377.50 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Continued To Jul-06-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Nov-09-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Vicky Chan for defendant and moving party Leah Madden, David Madden and Cindy Madden

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Defendant's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $373.80 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
